name: Cindy's Chocolate Chip Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add the white sugar, egg, vanilla extract, and salt; mix well.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips and oats until evenly distributed.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto the prepared baking sheet.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
